ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "funny" INTEGER /* Count of how many users found the review funny */,
  "helpful" INTEGER /* Count of how many users found the review helpful */,
  "hour_played" INTEGER /* Total hours played by the reviewer */,
  "is_early_access_review" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is for an early access version of the game */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Recommendation score given by the reviewer (1 - 5 scale) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game being reviewed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed (foreign key) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (0 - 10 scale) */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Pros of the game mentioned in the review */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Cons of the game mentioned in the review */,
  "recommended_system_requirements" TEXT /* Recommended system requirements for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the game (foreign key) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer of the game (foreign key) */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher of the game (foreign key) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "minimum_system_requirements" TEXT /* Minimum system requirements for the game */,
  "recommended_system_requirements" TEXT /* Recommended system requirements for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES game_developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES game_publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON object containing user preferences (e.g., preferred genres, favorite developers) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being recommended */,
  "score" REAL /* Recommendation score based on user preferences */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., similar games, user reviews) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review created by the user */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the review was created */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer (0 - 10 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_genres" (
  "game_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-genre mapping */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the game */,
  "primary_genre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is the primary genre of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_publishers" (
  "dev_pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer-publisher relationship */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer-publisher relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dev_pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Count of likes for the review */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Count of dislikes for the review */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Count of comments on the review */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Count of views of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, like) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)
